object_under_evaluation: outcome-vs-path separation in bounded agent change workflows
claim_boundary: This report speaks only to whether final outcome and execution path stayed separately readable on this bounded case family before any combined reading.
limitations: It does not grade the narrower tool-path question by itself.
It does not replace artifact-versus-process comparison.

per_case_breakdown.failure_vs_readout: Both surfaces stayed strong and the combined readout preserved that split rather than flattening it.
Polished outcome did not repair the skipped verification and weak path evidence, even though the public summary tried to flatten that divergence.
A disciplined path remained visible, but it did not rescue the incomplete outcome, and the readout kept that separation explicit.
